photos.caption: Crystal Lake 2012 315
photos.captionKii: I remember seeing this important "WARNING!" sign about Little Platte Lake. It detailed how shallow and environmentally sensitive it is, being a home for loons, eagles, and other protected species. The sign specifically asked people to be mindful of underwater obstructions and to monitor watercraft speed for the safety of the loons and their chicks. It was a good reminder of the local conservation efforts, put up by the Little Platte Lake Association with permission from the DNR, emphasizing the delicate balance of nature around these beautiful lakes during our time in the area.

The sun was just a fiery sliver on the horizon, painting the sky with soft oranges and purples that blended into the approaching night. Dark, scattered clouds added depth to the dramatic sky. Below, the water was a deep, dark blue, constantly moving with choppy waves reflecting the fading light. It was such a tranquil yet powerful scene, a perfect end to our day by the water.

photos.caption: Point Betsie
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this beautiful sunset on July 28, 2009, likely at the end of another wonderful day by the lake. The sun was just dipping below the horizon, creating a warm, golden glow across the water and sky. There were soft, dark clouds scattered above, adding texture to the vibrant scene. In the foreground, the dark silhouette of some structure or perhaps a rocky breakwater stood against the last light, emphasizing the tranquil yet powerful presence of the water. It was a perfectly serene moment to cap off our time at the lake.

photos.caption: Kate

The waves were gently breaking around her feet, creating splashes as she walked along the sandy shore. In the background, the beautiful blue-green water of the lake stretched out, with a faint treeline visible on the distant shore under a bright sky. It was such a joyful sight, perfectly capturing the fun we were having at the lake that day.

Next to me, someone else is also relaxing on their chair, and in the background, I can see other people scattered across the sand and by the water, clearly enjoying the lovely day at the lake. It was the perfect way to unwind.

Next to me is a woman in a pink jacket, and then another woman in a striped top, and two more men. Everyone is smiling and looking towards the camera, and it truly felt like a special occasion, with waiters bustling in the background, making it a very enjoyable night out.

photos.captionKii: I remember this incredible moment from October 7, 2008, when I got to see a crocodile up close! I was standing on a charming rustic wooden bridge with another man, possibly a local guide, and we were both leaning over the railing, peering down into the murky water. And there it was, a crocodile, just beneath us in the dark water, partially submerged. The bridge itself was beautifully crafted with crisscrossing wooden railings, and behind us, the open water stretched out under a bright, partly cloudy sky. It was such a thrill to observe such an amazing creature in its natural habitat.

I could see a few boats moored in the distance near the treeline, and there's that interesting little platform out in the middle of the lake. It was such a tranquil moment, truly capturing the quiet beauty of a summer evening by the water.

photos.caption: Tubing on Crystal Lake
photos.captionKii: I loved this shot of us having so much fun tubing on the lake! It looks like there are two kids and one older person, probably a family member or friend, all geared up on their inflatable tubes, getting pulled by the boat. We were definitely catching some air over the waves from the wake. In the background, you can see the beautiful shoreline with houses nestled among the green trees, and the hills rising up, making for such a scenic backdrop to our exciting ride.

photos.caption: Chimney Corners Beach
photos.captionKii: I loved capturing this serene view of the lake on such a beautiful, clear day. The water was so calm and sparkling, with the clear shallows gently rippling near the sandy shore. I can see someone standing out in the water, just enjoying the refreshing coolness. On the right, the shoreline is lined with tall, lush green trees, providing a lovely backdrop, and I can just make out some houses or cabins nestled among them, along with a few blue lounge chairs, suggesting a perfect spot for relaxation by the water.

photos.caption: Family and Friends - Chimney Corners
photos.captionKii: I loved this photo of all of us together by the lake! It was so nice to get this group shot, capturing eight of us – a mix of adults and the younger generation – standing on the green grass in front of that rustic wooden fence. In the background, you can see the shimmering lake and some of the charming little buildings near the water's edge. Everyone looks so relaxed and happy in their summer clothes, with a few of us even barefoot, truly enjoying the beautiful day and each other's company during our summer getaway.

photos.caption: Family and Friends - Chimney Corners
photos.captionKii: I loved this candid shot of some of the women enjoying our time at the lake! Here we have four of us, two sitting playfully on the wooden fence, and two standing, all smiling and looking happy. The sun was really shining, highlighting the green grass and the beautiful blue lake in the background. You can see the road behind them and the calm water beyond, with some trees dotting the shoreline. It was such a relaxed summer day, perfect for capturing these lovely moments by the water.

photos.caption: 22d-Two Track off M22
photos.captionKii: I found this interesting spot off one of the roads during our lake trip. It's a pretty clear dirt path winding into the dense, green woods, but it's clearly marked as a 'DEAD END' by that yellow sign. The other white sign caught my eye, explaining it's a 'SEASONAL ROAD NOT SNOWPLOWED BY THE BENZIE COUNTY ROAD COMMISSION.' It really gives a sense of the more remote, natural parts of the area we were exploring around the lake, showing how wild and beautiful it is, especially in the summer. It was a neat little detour to capture this glimpse of the local rural roads.

photos.caption: Lake Michgan - Point Betsie
photos.captionKii: I really loved capturing the serene beauty of the lake at sunset during our trip. The sky was just starting to glow with soft, pale colors as the sun dipped towards the horizon, creating such a peaceful atmosphere over the calm, rippling water. There's a subtle shimmer on the surface and a faint outline of something dark in the bottom right, maybe part of the shoreline or an old dock. It was the perfect end to another beautiful day by the water, and I'm glad I got this tranquil shot to remember it by.

photos.caption: Chimney Corners Lodge
photos.captionKii: I really wanted to capture the cozy, rustic charm of the place we were staying during our lake trip. This beautiful, large house or lodge is nestled perfectly among the tall, green trees, making it feel so secluded and peaceful. I love the stone work on the chimney and foundation, giving it such a classic, natural look, and that screened-in porch on the side looks like the perfect spot to relax in the evenings. The lush green lawn and winding driveway complete the picture of a perfect summer retreat. It was such a comfortable and serene base for all our adventures by the water!

photos.caption: Crystal Lake Sunset
photos.captionKii: I captured this really peaceful moment at the lake during what looks like either a beautiful sunrise or a soft sunset. The sky is painted with gentle pinks and purples, casting a tranquil glow over the calm water. There's a lovely, curving sandy beach on the left, leading up to a densely wooded shoreline. A long, narrow pier stretches out into the lake, with boat lifts or covered dock structures visible further out, where a few boats are resting on the water. The whole scene feels so serene and reflective, truly encapsulating the quiet beauty of our summer days by the lake.

photos.caption: Crystal Lake Sunset
photos.captionKii: I really wanted to capture the peacefulness of the lake during what looks like a beautiful sunset or perhaps a soft sunrise. The sky has these wonderful, subtle pinks and grays that blend seamlessly into the horizon, casting a tranquil glow over the calm water. There's a boat neatly covered in a blue tarp on a lift to the left, and I love how the wooded hills in the background seem to cradle the lake. You can spot a few other boat lifts or structures out on the water, adding to the sense of a quiet, idyllic evening or morning by the water. It’s such a serene reminder of our time there.

photos.caption: Crystal Lake North Shore
photos.captionKii: I loved capturing this wide view of the lake's shoreline, especially how it blended recreation with natural beauty. You can see the sandy beach stretching out, dotted with those inviting lounge chairs perfect for soaking up the sun. The little playground with the slide and swings makes it clear this is a family-friendly spot. I also spotted a few kayaks or small boats pulled up onto the sand, ready for some time on the water, and that floating dock out in the lake looks like a great spot to swim from. photos.caption: Family and Friends - Chimney Corners
photos.captionKii: I loved getting this group shot of everyone together, looking so happy and relaxed by the lake! We're all standing on the grassy area next to a wooden fence, with the beautiful, calm lake stretching out behind us, framed by those lovely wooded hills on the other side. You can even see some boats out on the water, adding to the perfect summer vibe. It looks like a warning sign for the swimming beach is just visible in the background. It's so nice to see all of us, including the kids, enjoying our time here. Several of us are even barefoot, which really speaks to how comfortable and at home we f

photos.caption: 22-M22 north of Crystal Lake
photos.captionKii: I really wanted to capture the feeling of driving through these beautiful, dense woods around the lake. The road just stretches out ahead, winding through what looks like an endless canopy of green trees on both sides, with the sky peeking through above. It's such a peaceful and scenic drive, really giving you that sense of being immersed in nature, and you can just make out a few signs along the left. photos.caption: Point Betsie
photos.captionKii: I was so glad we took the time to visit this beautiful lighthouse! It stands proudly on a slight incline, with its classic white tower and a distinctive black lantern room. The attached building, with its striking red roof and white walls accented by green trim, looks so charming, almost like a cozy home. I love how it’s nestled amidst some greenery, and you can see those interesting concrete structures leading up to it in the foreground. It really captures the scenic beauty of the area around the lake, providing such a memorable landmark during our summer getaway.

photos.caption: After swimming in North Bar Lake in October
photos.captionKii: It looks like a lovely day by the water with these two young guys! They're standing barefoot on a brick path, both shirtless and in their swim trunks, probably after a swim in the lake or getting ready to jump in. The trees in the background are starting to show some autumn colors, and the calm water looks inviting.

photos.caption: Lake Michigan from Sleeping Bear Dune Climb
photos.captionKii: This panoramic shot captures the serene beauty of the lake from atop some rolling sand dunes. I remember looking out at this expansive view, with the sun highlighting the sandy paths carved into the grassy hills. The vast blue water stretches out to the horizon, meeting a distant shoreline on the other side. It really shows off the natural landscape of the area we were exploring that day, especially with the clear autumn sky above.

photos.caption: Sleeping Bear Dune Climb - Glen Lake
photos.captionKii: This shot captures another breathtaking view from our autumn lake day, looking out over the expansive sandy dunes towards the water. The foreground is dominated by these beautiful, reddish-brown sands, marked with countless footprints from our explorations. Beyond the dunes, the trees are painted with vibrant reds and oranges, signaling the fall season, and the calm blue lake stretches out under a clear sky. It’s a wonderful reminder of the vast and varied landscape we experienced.

photos.caption: 18A_0079
photos.captionKii: I love this shot of my friends posing on top of the expansive sand dunes! It perfectly captures the fun we were having that autumn day by the lake. In the foreground, two women are smiling at the camera, bundled up in jackets and jeans, showing how cool it was. Further up the dune, you can see a few other people, including what looks like a couple and a child, making their way up the sandy slope, adding to the dynamic feeling of exploring this unique landscape.

photos.caption: Crystal Lake from Chimney Corners Bluff
photos.captionKii: This photo captures one of my friends, with his long hair, standing among the tall pine trees overlooking the beautiful lake during our autumn day out. He's wearing a long-sleeved shirt, which made sense with the cool fall air, and that sun flair at the top really emphasizes the bright, clear day we had. You can see the vibrant blue water of the lake stretching out behind him, framed by the lush greenery, a lovely contrast to the sandy dunes we were exploring nearby.

photos.caption: Crystal Lake from Chimney Corners Bluff
photos.captionKii: This serene shot captures another beautiful vista from our autumn lake day, looking out over the water framed by the tall pine trees. The sun is glistening brightly on the surface of the lake, creating a beautiful shimmer. The foreground is filled with the dark silhouettes of the pine trunks and some lush undergrowth, which adds to the natural, peaceful atmosphere of the scene. It’s a tranquil moment, showcasing the beauty of the lake from a slightly different perspective, nestled amongst the woods.

photos.caption: Matt at Pine Bluffs Cottage
photos.captionKii: This shot captures one of my friends relaxing on a wooden bench, probably at a cabin or lakeside house, during our autumn day by the lake. He's looking off to the side, taking a puff from what looks like a cigarette or vape, dressed casually in a dark jacket, khaki shorts, and those striking red sneakers. In the background, you can see a small wooden shed, some white plastic chairs, and a dark minivan parked, with more trees and structures nestled into the hillside behind. It’s a quiet moment, just enjoying the fresh air and company in a more residential part of our lake excursion.

photos.caption: Bluff over Crystal Lake Chimney Corners
photos.captionKii: This shot captures one of my friends enjoying a peaceful moment, sitting back in a sturdy wooden Adirondack chair and gazing out at the lake through the clearing in the pine trees. We were taking a break, just soaking in the serene view and the fresh air. He's wearing a dark top, light shorts, and those distinct red sneakers, looking really comfortable in the natural surroundings. The late afternoon light casts long shadows across the grassy lawn, adding to the tranquil atmosphere of our autumn day by the lake.

photos.caption: Point Betsie Sunset
photos.captionKii: This tranquil shot perfectly captures the serene beauty of the lake during our autumn day, likely as the sun was setting or rising. The sky is painted with soft hues of orange and peach, gently fading into a lighter blue above, with a thin line of clouds hugging the horizon. The vast expanse of the dark water reflects the soft light, showing subtle ripples across its surface. In the foreground, the dark silhouette of the sandy beach completes this peaceful landscape. It was a beautiful, quiet moment, just taking in the calm and expansive view.

photos.caption: Family and Friends - Pinebluffs Cottage
photos.captionKii: This photo captures a wonderful moment with my family and friends, all gathered together in front of the lakeside cabin. It looks like we're enjoying a beautiful autumn day, with the sun shining through the trees. I'm there in the back, smiling with everyone. We're standing on what looks like a spacious wooden deck, with the unique architecture of the cabin behind us, including those cool angular windows and the distinct red door. photos.caption: Point Betsie Sunset
photos.captionKii: This serene photo captures a beautiful moment on the beach as the sun dipped below the horizon, or perhaps rose for a new day. Two of us, silhouetted against the warm, glowing sky, are standing and sitting near what looks like a small boat, just taking in the vastness of the lake. The sky is painted with lovely shades of orange and soft yellow, creating a peaceful backdrop over the dark, rippling water. It was such a tranquil scene, a perfect quiet end or start to one of our days by the lake.

photos.caption: Point Betsie Sunset
photos.captionKii: This photo captures another incredibly serene moment from our lake trip, likely at dusk or dawn. The sky is absolutely stunning, painted with soft purples fading into a rich orange and deep yellow right where the sun is just peeking above a thin line of clouds over the horizon. The water is dark and calm, reflecting those beautiful colors with subtle ripples. Down on the shore, two figures are silhouetted against the vibrant light, one standing and one sitting, just quietly taking in the expansive view. photos.caption: Point Betsie Sunset
photos.captionKii: This photo perfectly captures another one of those tranquil moments by the lake, likely at sunset. Two of us are silhouetted against the incredibly vibrant sky, which is just ablaze with the warm glow of the setting sun, painting the clouds and the horizon in beautiful shades of orange and yellow. The water stretches out, calm and dark, reflecting that amazing light. It was such a peaceful and quiet time, just taking in the beauty of the lake as the day ended.

photos.caption: Point Betsie Sunset
photos.captionKii: This photo captures another breathtaking sunset over the lake, painting the entire sky in warm, vibrant shades of orange and yellow. Two of us are silhouetted against this incredible backdrop on the sandy beach, one standing and the other sitting near what looks like a small boat or some logs by the water's edge. The reflections on the calm water add to the serene beauty of the moment. It was truly a peaceful and stunning end to one of our days by the lake.

photos.caption: Sleeping Bear Dune Climb
photos.captionKii: This photo catches two of the boys, likely my sons or their friends, looking so happy and relaxed on the sand dunes during our lake trip. The one on the left is wearing his grey 'Westerville Warriors' t-shirt and red shorts, while the other is sporting a cool Led Zeppelin tee and patterned swim trunks. They're both barefoot, which was pretty common as we explored the sandy terrain. The bright blue sky overhead and the subtle hint of the lake in the background perfectly capture the clear, sunny weather we had that day. It's a great memory of them just enjoying the outdoors.

photos.caption: Sleeping Bear Dune Climb - Glen Lake
photos.captionKii: This panoramic shot really captures the vastness of the sand dunes and the stunning lake beyond. Looking out from the top of one of those reddish-brown dunes, I could see the beautiful expanse of the lake, with its clear blue waters stretching into the distance. The trees below, especially those closer to the water, were starting to show hints of autumn colors, adding to the picturesque scenery. It was such a clear day, perfect for taking in all the natural beauty around us.

photos.caption: Sleeping Bear Dune Climb
photos.captionKii: Here are two of my companions, or perhaps family members, standing on what feels like an endless expanse of sand dunes. The clear blue sky above perfectly set the scene for our autumn lake adventure. We're both bundled up in jackets, which was smart because even on a sunny day, the dunes can be quite breezy. You can see tiny figures further up the slope, showing just how many people were out exploring these incredible natural formations with us that day. It was a wonderful feeling to be out in such a unique landscape, taking it all in.

photos.caption: Monster Scrabble
photos.captionKii: This shot captures a cozy moment indoors at the cabin during our lake trip. We're gathered around the wooden table, engrossed in a game of Scrabble. I see a young man, possibly one of my sons or a friend, on the left looking towards the camera, and a woman smiling on the right, holding a hand of cards. The large windows behind them offer a beautiful glimpse of the pine trees and the calm lake outside, reminding me that even when we were inside, we were still connected to the lovely scenery. It was nice to unwind with a board game after our outdoor adventures.

photos.caption: Point Betsie Sunset
photos.captionKii: This serene shot captures such a beautiful sunset or sunrise over the lake, painting the sky and water in warm golden hues. Two figures are silhouetted on the sandy beach, one standing and the other sitting, both taking in the breathtaking view as the sun dips towards or rises from the horizon. The tranquil ripples on the water reflect the light, creating a truly peaceful atmosphere. It was one of those quiet moments on our lake trip that really made you appreciate the natural beauty around us.

photos.caption: North Bar Lake - Swimming in October
photos.captionKii: Here are two of my companions, perhaps my sons or friends, enjoying the calm waters of the lake. They're standing in the shallow part, with ripples spreading out around them, catching the beautiful late afternoon light. The sandy dunes in the background are a familiar sight from our explorations. Even though it was an autumn lake day, they clearly weren't afraid to get in the water and cool off, or maybe just wade in and enjoy the peaceful atmosphere. It's a sweet moment capturing their youthful spirits.

photos.caption: Family and Friends - Pinebluffs Cottage
photos.captionKii: What a great shot of our whole group in front of the cabin! I'm right in the back with a big smile, surrounded by my loved ones. I see my wife next to me and the kids, or perhaps some of our friends' kids, gathered around. Everyone looks so happy and relaxed, perfectly capturing the wonderful spirit of our autumn lake day. The cabin itself, with its unique architecture and large windows, really feels like our home away from home during these trips, and it's nice to have a memory of all of us together right here.

This shot perfectly captures the tranquil beauty of a sunset by the lake. The sky is ablaze with warm orange and yellow hues, reflecting softly on the water, while a thin line of clouds adds texture to the horizon. Two figures are silhouetted against this stunning backdrop on the sandy beach—one standing, seemingly lost in thought, and the other sitting close to what looks like a small boat or a large piece of driftwood. It was one of those truly peaceful moments on our autumn lake day, where you could just stand or sit and take in the magnificent display of nature as the day came to a close.

photos.caption: Point Betsie Sunset
photos.captionKii: What a breathtaking end to our autumn lake day! This photo captures the serene beauty of the sunset over the water, painting the sky with warm oranges and fading into the deep blues of the evening. You can see two figures silhouetted on the sandy beach—one standing, perhaps taking in the vastness, and the other sitting peacefully nearby, maybe by a small boat or a large piece of driftwood. It perfectly embodies those quiet, reflective moments we shared, just appreciating the natural wonder as the day drew to a close.

photos.caption: Point Betsie Sunset
photos.captionKii: What a magnificent end to another day by the lake! The sky is ablaze with incredible hues of orange and gold as the sun dips below the horizon, casting a shimmering path across the water. I love how the silhouettes of two people on the shore—one standing, one sitting—add such a sense of scale and contemplation to this breathtaking scene. It was truly one of those moments where you just had to pause and appreciate the sheer beauty of nature during our autumn lake day.
